productDisplayName: Baggit Women Bunnies Taj Brown Wallet
description: Worry no longer about managing money, cards and coins in your tote bag! Organise your everyday essentials into this stylish wallet from baggit and drop it into your messy hold-all. This three-fold piece is on the top of our wishlist this year. A sophisticated addition to your accessory collection, you can carry this piece in your hand or pop it into your bag.Dimensions: 21.5 cm x 11.5 cmCrafted from genuine leatherette with a three-fold open stylePrinted upper with a concealed magnetic closuresPrinted branding on the frontEight card holders on a detachable flap, one id card holder, one compartment with a zippered separator and a key holder on the left foldOne buttoned pocket and three pockets on the centre foldA zippered pocket on the backCareWipe with clean, damp cloth to remove dirt
